channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Goodbye, unreliable weather forecasts? Google DeepMind's AI model sets new benchmark for 15-day predictions
item.description: Google DeepMind's new GenCast AI model can forecast the weather with incredible accuracy, up to 15 days in advance.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Enter the next phase of Industry 4.0 with edge AI
item.description: The business world is changing at a rapid pace. Less than 10% of the FTSE 500 companies that existed fifty years ago are still around today and less than half of the companies founded since 2000 are still operating.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Challenges Faced by Chief Information Officers: Navigating Complexity to Embracing Change
item.description: Understanding the eight challenges that CIOs face, from managing complexity to embracing change and being willing to stretch.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: What to expect from AI in the enterprise in 2025
item.description: This year saw the initial hype and excitement over AI settle down with more realistic expectations taking hold.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Data center certifications target newcomers, experts, and sustainability pros
item.description: As data centers evolve from traditional compute and storage facilities into AI powerhouses, the demand for qualified professionals continues to grow exponentially and salaries are high.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Unlocking the Power of GenAI: A Game-Changer for Cloud Modernization Efforts
item.description: Discover how organizations are leveraging GenAI to speed up cloud modernization, improve customer experiences, and enhance security.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Dubai Police will have its first floating smart police station in 2026
item.description: Dubai Police has always been at the forefront of innovation, embracing technology to enhance the safety, security, and well-being of the city’s residents and visitors.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: UnitedHealthcare CEO murder: How Silicon Valley protects its CEOs
item.description: Trying to keep tech leaders safe in a country awash with guns, and in an industry that can generate volatile emotions, does not come cheaply.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Baron, The Mercury News

item.title: How 2025’s digital products will evolve
item.description: When most people hear “TikTok features,” there’s usually some eye-rolling involved. But after 17 years of helping companies navigate digital transformation, I’ve noticed something more profound happening.
item.dc:creator: Brad Weber, Fast Company

item.title: Federal appeals court upholds law requiring sale or ban of TikTok in the US
item.description: A federal appeals court panel on Friday unanimously upheld a law that could lead to a ban on TikTok as soon as next month, handing a resounding defeat to the popular social media platform as it fights for its survival in the U.S. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Better together? Why AWS is unifying data analytics and AI services in SageMaker
item.description: Data warehousing, business intelligence, data analytics, and AI services are all coming together under one roof at Amazon Web Services.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Mace claims X is censoring her posts
item.description: Rep. Nancy Mace (R-S.C.) claimed her posts are being censored on the social platform X, after a content warning was attached to a video of her delivering a message to transgender rights activists. "Now my posts are being *censored* by @X ?! @elonmusk Did you see this? I'd like to have a word.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: The EU makes an urgent TikTok inquiry on Russia's role in Romanian election turmoil
item.description: The European Union has sent TikTok an urgent request for more information about Romanian intelligence files suggesting that Moscow coordinated influencers on its platform to promote an election candidate who became the surprise front-runner in the nation’s presidential election.
item.dc:creator: Kelvin Chan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: China's ban on key high-tech materials could have broad impact on industries, economy
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — China has banned exports of key materials used to make a wide range of products, including smartphones, electric vehicles, radar systems and CT scanners, swiping back at Washington after it expanded export controls to include dozens of Chinese companies that make equipment used to pro
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Trump names David Sacks as AI, crypto czar
item.description: President-elect Trump said Thursday that venture capitalist David Sacks will serve as the White House artificial intelligence (AI) and cryptocurrency czar.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Google introduces PaliGemma 2 vision-language AI models
item.description: Google has introduced a new family of PaliGemma vision-language models, offering scalable performance, long captioning, and support for specialized tasks.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Chinese online retailer Temu suspended in Vietnam
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Vietnam has suspended the operations of Chinese online retailer Temu after it failed to meet a government deadline to register the company by the end of November.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Meta to build $10 billion AI data center in Louisiana as Elon Musk expands his Tennessee AI facility
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The largest artificial intelligence data center ever built by Facebook’s parent company Meta is coming to northeast Louisiana, the company said Wednesday, bringing hopes that the $10 billion facility will transform an economically neglected corner of the state. Republican Gov.
item.dc:creator: JACK BROOK and ADRIAN SAINZ, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: White House says at least 8 US telecom firms, dozens of nations impacted by China hacking campaign
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A top White House official on Wednesday said at least eight U.S. telecom firms and dozens of nations have been impacted by a Chinese hacking campaign.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: OpenAI's Sam Altman 'not that worried' about rival Elon Musk's influence in the Trump administration
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, who is in a legal dispute with rival Elon Musk, said he is “not that worried” about Musk's influence in the incoming Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Kyndryl, Nokia expand AI, quantum-safe connectivity options
item.description: Kyndryl is extending its relationship with Nokia and expanding its menu of integration services by including more of Nokia’s data center networking products.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: AI catches cancer that mammogram misses
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Spotify Wrapped: How to view, share your personalized recap
item.description: Want to show everyone who your top five artists were or just how much time you spent listening to music and podcasts? Now is your chance.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, NewsNation

item.title: Intel’s CEO, Pat Gelsinger, ‘retires’ — riiiiight
item.description: Back in the 1990s, when Bill Clinton was president, people figured out they might just want to be on the internet, and Intel and Microsoft were the major technology powers.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Founder of failed crypto lending platform Celsius Network pleads guilty to fraud charges
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The founder and former CEO of the failed cryptocurrency lending platform Celsius Network could face decades in prison after pleading guilty Tuesday to federal fraud charges, admitting that he misled customers about the business.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Securing the AI data pipeline with confidential AI
item.description: There is a need to create secure computing capabilities that maintain the privacy and confidentiality of AI models and data sets. The post Securing the AI data pipeline with confidential AI first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: What to make of Pat Gelsinger’s abrupt exit
item.description: The retirement of Intel CEO Pat Gelsinger has left more questions than Intel answered in its statement regarding his departure. Intel in the past had a measured process of ascension for future CEOs.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: TikTok defends handling of Romania election content in grilling by EU lawmakers
item.description: BUCHAREST, Romania (AP) — TikTok took down several networks that tried to meddle in Romania's elections, executives said Tuesday as they defended the company's election integrity measures to European Union lawmakers.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN and STEPHEN McGRATH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: AT&T sees earnings growth over next 3 years; eyes more than $40B in anticipated shareholder returns
item.description: AT&T anticipates earnings growth over the next three years thanks to the momentum of 5G and fiber services.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE CHAPMAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: China bans exports to US of gallium, germanium, antimony in response to chip sanctions
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — China announced Tuesday it is banning exports to the United States of gallium, germanium, antimony and other key high-tech materials with potential military applications, as a general principle, lashing back at U.S. limits on semiconductor-related exports.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: AWS tries to lure users to its cloud via storage ease of use
item.description: At its re:Invent 2024 conference this week, AWS rolled out five new storage tools and services with the goal of making its offerings easier to work with, if not cheaper or better. With the incremental differences in the major enterprise cloud environments today, that may be enough.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: FTC opens Microsoft antitrust investigation that Trump administration must carry on or drop
item.description: Antitrust enforcers with the Federal Trade Commission have opened a wide-ranging investigation into Microsoft's business practices, starting a big legal project that an incoming Trump administration must take up or abandon.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Linux fundamentals: Viewing files, commands, processes and systems
item.description: Linux provides a useful array of commands for managing file permissions, getting information on commands, displaying running processes and displaying details on the system itself.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: This crime shot up 400% — how to protect yourself
item.description: Old-fashioned check fraud is back in style, quintupling over the past year. Here are a few low-tech, practical means of protecting yourself.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
